_doc: AUTHORITATIVE per-year LAST NATIONAL PICK (including pass picks) — the chaining offset for the rookie/pre-season drafts. Replaces the engine's prior inference of this quantity from the ND row-COUNT (rl_model.py:91), which is correct only when the store's national sequence is gapless (19/23 years) and wrong where concession/pass picks break that (2010-11). Owner convention: first rookie pick of year Y = last_national_pick[Y] + 1; PSD (pre-season draft) chains after national, before rookie.
_provenance_summary: Built 2026-07-11 (PICK-CORRECTIONS build). Values for 21 gapless years are the store's own authoritative national sequence (count==max==last pick). 2010 overridden to 77 (corroborated). 2011 kept at store max 89 (evidenced real, flagged). ENVIRONMENT CONSTRAINT: this build's egress policy hard-blocks external hosts (403 CONNECT to en.wikipedia.org, draftguru, footywire; WebFetch unavailable) — per-year pick-by-pick web verification of the tail years could NOT be performed here; the store's gapless sequences (Q5-anchored) are the authority used instead. A web-enabled re-verification of the tail years + 2010-11 remains owed (flagged to the supervisor).
convention: rookie_effective_pick = last_national_pick[year] + rookie_slot; psd_effective_pick = last_national_pick[year] + psd_slot (PSD chains after national, before rookie)
